posts.author: Dreyer (Dreyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

On the previous version of Invoices and quotes, Items were groups together as per the product board we setup, no its just one big list not ordered in any particular way…

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to achieve nothing, I just want the functionality back as item selection is no almost impossible the way it is presented now.
